---
title: "R Test"
author: "Kuiyuan Shao"
date: "2024-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
data <- read.csv("moneythings交易明细_20240423163457.csv")
index <- data$账户 == ""
data$账户[data$账户 == ""] <- data$目标账户[data$账户 == ""]

data$目标账户[index] <- ""
data$金额[data$交易类型 == "转入"] <- abs(as.numeric(gsub(",", "", data$金额[data$交易类型 == "转入"])))

write_excel_csv(data, file = "qianwang.csv")


data <- read.csv("qianwang.csv")

data$金额 <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", data$金额))

```


```{r}
data <- read.csv("data.csv")[, -1]
miss <- read.csv("miss.csv")
mask <- is.na(miss)
```

```{r}
observed <- read.csv("observed_2.csv", sep = "\t")
imputed <- read.csv("imputed_2.csv", sep = "\t")


observed$X2 == 0
for (i in 2:5){
  observed[observed[, i] == 0, i] <- imputed[observed[, i] == 0, i]
}

imputed <- observed
names(imputed) = c("index", "X_tilde", "Y", "X", "Z")
imputed <- imputed[, -1]

max_ <- lapply(miss, max, na.rm = T)
max_ <- (unlist(max_) + 1)
for (i in 1:4){
  imputed[, i] <- imputed[, i] * max_[i] - 1
}
imputed$Z <- round(imputed$Z)
lm(Y ~ X + Z, imputed)

ggplot(imputed[observed$X2 == 0, ]) + geom_point(aes(x = X, y = Y))


sqrt(sum((data * mask - imputed * mask)^2) / sum(mask))
```
